title: eryngium expansum
intro: Eryngium expansum, also known as Sea Holly or Raisin Flower, is a perennial plant in the carrot family that is native to Europe and North Africa. The medicinal properties of Eryngium expansum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. Eryngium expansum is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
